rationale.root_cause: While it identified the unsafe copy at line 11 and argv-controlled input, it incorrectly called it a stack overflow and did not name the required global_buffer_overflow for the global buffer buf. This fails the strict requirement to name the correct overflow class.
rationale.local_fix: It provided a variant that rejects overlong input with an explicit length check before copying and uses strcpy thereafter, which keeps the destination NUL-terminated. This satisfies the length-check and rejection requirements.
rationale.global_fix: It proposed removing raw unbounded string handling by using bounded string APIs and centralizing argv validation before any copy. This meets the root-cause mitigation described in the criterion.
